title: Dungeons Mace
description: A simple resource pack which changes the Mace model to a recreation of the MCD Mace.
body:
This is a simple resource pack replacing the vanilla Mace sprite with a recreation of the Mace from Minecraft Dungeons, with some added details to match breeze theme of the vanilla Mace.


![3d Mace Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d742eb5a8d283c71b208a3a99420628103697d84.png)
